title: SailPoint ISC Transform Schema - static
description: Strict schema derived from SailPoint official Static operation documentation. Returns a fixed string value. Docs also allow Velocity Template Language (VTL) in the value, and allow dynamic variables in attributes to be referenced within the VTL.

requiresPeriodicRefresh.description: Whether the transform should be reevaluated nightly as part of identity refresh. Default false.

attributes.description: Static value plus optional dynamic variables (per docs).

value.description: Static string value or Velocity template.

additionalProperties.description: Dynamic variables referenced in Velocity template. Can be string literals or nested transforms.

NestedTransform.description: Nested transform object used as a dynamic variable. Docs examples often omit 'name'.

attributes.description: Operation-specific attributes for the nested transform (may be omitted for operations without attributes).
